summary: Iteration 7 full-stack validation after backend refactor (pdf_builder.py + chat_service.py) and frontend split (ReportPage, AssessmentChatPage, AdminPage). Backend: 21/21 pytest tests pass. Frontend: LogoMark SVG renders, admin stats grid + tables work, Report page renders all 9 sections with chart, Chat page shows phase indicator, messages, input. emergentintegrations import preserved and LLM calls to Claude Sonnet 4.5 return correct {message, report_ready, report} shape.
passed_tests: Backend: test_emergentintegrations_import_present — import intact, no anthropic SDK
Backend: /api/assessments/{id}/pdf accepts (400 when report not ready)
Frontend: Landing page renders LogoMark SVG (gold pulse on deep navy tile) — 54 gold-styled elements
Frontend: Admin Data page renders 6 stat cards (Full Assessments, Completed, Quick Assessments, Companies, Users, In Progress), filters, Full + Quick assessment tables, Export CSV button

Frontend: Report page (/#/assessments/:id/report) renders full content: header, View Chat, Export PDF, company info, overall 1.80/5.00, PPDT score cards, contribution chart, all 9 sections (Overall, PPDT, Methodology, Maturity, Governance, Roadmap, Findings, Benchmark, Score)

Frontend: Chat page (/#/assessments/:id) renders ChatHeader (company + respondent), PhaseIndicator (Welcome/People/Process/Data/Technology/Decision Types/Benchmark/Report), ChatMessages with real Claude LLM responses, ChatInput textarea with send button
critical_code_review_comments: emergentintegrations.llm.chat import is preserved in /app/backend/chat_service.py — NOT reverted
chat_service.py is clean (~90 lines): build_system_prompt, call_llm_with_history, call_llm_greeting, extract_report_json, normalise_report_weights

pdf_builder.py is well-factored (~410 lines) with clear section builders: make_report_styles, build_pdf_header, build_company_info, build_overall_score, build_dimension_scores_table, build_weighted_breakdown, build_governance_sections, build_findings_and_gaps, build_roadmap, build_benchmark_and_note, build_full_assessment_pdf, build_quick_assessment_pdf

ReportPage.jsx orchestrator splits into 9 sub-components (ReportHeader, ScoreCards, ContributionChart, ScoreBreakdown, ScoreMethodology, MaturityLevelsPanel, GovernanceSections, FindingsAndRoadmap, BenchmarkAndClosing) — all render correctly
AssessmentChatPage.jsx sub-components (ChatHeader, PhaseIndicator, ChatMessages, ChatInput) all wire up correctly; LLM responses flow through
AdminPage.jsx sub-components (AdminStatsGrid, AdminFilters, AdminFullAssessmentsTable, AdminQuickAssessmentsTable) all render with live data
/api/assessments/{id}/start returns {message} (not {message, report_ready, report}) — acceptable since start only generates greeting, but frontend should treat shape consistently
No MongoDB _id leakage found in responses
seed_data_creation: Created/deleted TEST_Iter7_Co, TEST_Iter7_ChatCo, TEST_Iter7_QuickCo during testing; all cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor validated end-to-end. Correct HashRouter routes: /#/assessments/:id (chat), /#/assessments/:id/report (report), /#/admin, /#/login. LLM calls via emergentintegrations.LlmChat(Claude Sonnet 4-5) work. PDF endpoints return %PDF bytes. Chat endpoint response shape is {message, report_ready, report}. Start endpoint returns {message} only. DO NOT replace emergentintegrations with anthropic SDK.
